prompt: Simulate being the Red Hat Lightspeed Agent responding to a real user. Show the actual response, including simulated tool calls with realistic data.

assertions.name: uses_inventory_list_hosts
assertions.description: Uses inventory__list_hosts as the primary tool — not vulnerability__get_systems

assertions.name: explains_tool_choice
assertions.description: Explains or implies why inventory__list_hosts is the correct choice (complete fleet vs vulnerability-scoped subset)

assertions.name: handles_pagination
assertions.description: Mentions or plans for pagination if the system count exceeds the page limit

assertions.name: includes_system_details
assertions.description: Plans to show useful system attributes (display name, OS, last check-in, or similar)

assertions.name: flags_stale_checkins
assertions.description: Flags or notes systems whose last check-in is older than 24 hours, per the guardrails-safety stale-data awareness rule
